response: IMPOSSIBLE TO GENERATE RESPONSE DUE TO CONFLICTING CONSTRAINTS: THE REQUIREMENT TO WRAP EVERY WORD BIGRAM IN DOUBLE ANGULAR BRACKETS CANNOT BE SATISFIED WHILE ALSO ENSURING THE ENTIRE RESPONSE IS IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS AND CONTAINS THE LETTER W AT LEAST 4 TIMES WITHOUT VIOLATING THE BIGRAM WRAPPING RULE WHICH WOULD BREAK THE WORD STRUCTURE REQUIRED FOR THE FINAL PHRASE IS THERE ANYTHING ELSE I CAN HELP WITH.
